cards.title: OpenAI Unveils Custom Chip Jalapeño
cards.body: OpenAI launched its first custom processor, named Jalapeño, built by Broadcom specifically for inference systems. The chip addresses OpenAI's unique computational requirements.

cards.title: Anthropic's Claude Tag Arrives on Slack
cards.body: Anthropic introduced Claude Tag, an always-on AI teammate for Slack that learns company context through messages. The feature captures organizational knowledge and enterprise workflows strategically.

cards.title: OpenAI Launches Open Source Bug Patching
cards.body: OpenAI is using AI to help the open source community identify and patch security vulnerabilities. The initiative strengthens collective defense against software bugs.

cards.title: Facebook Rolls Out AI Companion for Creators
cards.body: Facebook launched an AI companion app currently in testing with select creators. The app integrates Facebook's recently launched AI creator assistant.

cards.title: Figma Adds AI Features and Code Layers
cards.body: Figma released an update with new code layer support, motion and shader capabilities, and AI-powered custom plug-ins. The expansion enhances designer workflows significantly.

cards.title: Top AI Researchers Leave Google for Anthropic
cards.body: Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel departed Google to join Anthropic, following previous exits of Noam Shazeer and John Jumper. The departures reflect AI talent migration trends.

cards.title: Cerebras Stock Plunges After Earnings Report
cards.body: The AI chipmaker forecast narrower gross margins in its core business in its first post-IPO earnings report. Investor concerns sparked significant stock decline.

cards.title: Memory Chip Demand Drives Record Profits
cards.body: One US company quadrupled revenue to $41.45 billion and increased profit to $28.2 billion year-over-year. The memory chip crunch creates windfall opportunities.

cards.title: Agility Robotics Plans $2.5B SPAC IPO
cards.body: The humanoid robotics startup expects to generate $620 million in proceeds from a SPAC merger. Agility Robotics aims to go public in a major funding round.

cards.title: MoEngage Bets on Millions of AI Agents
cards.body: India's MoEngage completed an all-cash deal securing AI agent technology for individual customer assignment. The acquisition positions the platform for personalized marketing at scale.

cards.title: Fika Jobs Raises $4M for AI Interview Platform
cards.body: Stockholm-based Fika Jobs secured $4M for a video-first hiring platform combining AI interview agents with short-form profiles. The platform merges LinkedIn and TikTok hiring concepts.

cards.title: Vishal Sikka's Startup Challenges IT Services
cards.body: Backed by Mayfield and Aramco Ventures, the former Infosys chief launched a new venture with SAP and Infosys veterans. The startup targets disruption in IT services sector.

cards.title: AI Era Enters Token Rationing Phase
cards.body: Companies are implementing budget controls to prevent employees from exhausting AI token allocations with minor tasks. Token rationing replaces the brief tokenmaxxing era.

cards.title: Engineering Jobs Prove Resilient Against AI
cards.body: SignalFire data reveals engineers comprise a larger share of new hires despite AI automation fears. Engineering remains the most resilient job category.

cards.title: AI World Gets Loopy with Agent Swarms
cards.body: The loop takes agentic AI further by authorizing swarms of agents to work continuously in the background. The advancement enables endless autonomous operations.

cards.title: OpenAI Unveils Jalapeño Chip With Broadcom
cards.body: OpenAI launched its first custom chip designed specifically for inference systems at scale. Built by Broadcom, the processor named Jalapeño addresses the unique computational needs of running large language models efficiently.

cards.title: Top AI Researchers Flee Google for Anthropic
cards.body: Jonas Adler and Alexander Pritzel are the latest Google AI researchers to join Anthropic. The departures follow previous exits of prominent scientists Noam Shazeer and John Jumper.

cards.title: Cerebras Stock Drops After Earnings Forecast
cards.body: The AI chipmaker's first earnings report as a public company disappointed investors with narrower gross margin forecasts. Cerebras cited misunderstandings about its core business outlook.

cards.title: AI Engineers Prove More Resilient Than Expected
cards.body: Despite AI's disruptive narrative, engineering roles represent a larger share of new hires than layoffs. SignalFire data suggests AI implementation actually requires more engineering talent.

cards.title: Companies Ration AI Token Usage Budgets
cards.body: The brief era of unlimited AI token spending is ending as companies implement token rationing policies. Teams are now carefully managing AI inference costs to prevent budget overruns.

cards.title: Facebook Launches AI Companion App for Creators
cards.body: Facebook is rolling out an AI companion application that integrates its creator assistant tools. The app is currently in testing with select creators.

cards.title: Figma Adds Custom AI Plug-ins and Code Layers
cards.body: Figma's latest update introduces code layers, motion support, and custom AI-powered plug-ins for design tasks. The features enable designers to automate repetitive workflows.

cards.title: MoEngage Acquires AI Agent Marketing Technology
cards.body: India's MoEngage purchased technology that deploys individual AI agents for each customer in all-cash deal. The acquisition gives the marketing platform advanced personalization capabilities.

cards.title: Anthropic's Claude Tag Brings Slack Integration
cards.body: Anthropic launched Claude Tag, an always-on AI teammate for Slack that learns company context. The feature captures organizational knowledge and enterprise workflows strategically.

cards.title: Fika Jobs Raises $4M for AI Interview Platform
cards.body: Stockholm-based Fika Jobs launched a video-first hiring platform combining AI interview agents with short-form profiles. The platform resembles a LinkedIn-TikTok hybrid for recruitment.

cards.title: OpenAI Launches Open Source Bug-Patching Initiative
cards.body: OpenAI is using AI to help the open source community identify and fix security vulnerabilities. The initiative strengthens collective cybersecurity defenses.

cards.title: Agentic AI Enters "Loopy" Continuous Execution Phase
cards.body: The AI industry is moving toward "loopy" autonomous systems where agent swarms work continuously in the background. This represents an evolution beyond traditional agentic AI frameworks.

cards.title: Oracle's AI Investments Drive 21,000 Layoffs
cards.body: Oracle announced 21,000 job cuts to fund debt-backed AI infrastructure investments. The layoffs signal the company's strategic pivot toward AI services.
